def test_09_goods_detail_load(self):
        """GD-01: 商品详情加载"""
        page = CategoryPage(self.mini)
        page.refresh_page()
        # 滚动一下确保商品渲染
        self.mini.page.scroll_to_bottom()
        time.sleep(1)
        page.refresh_page()

        # 点击第一个商品
        page.click_first_goods()
        time.sleep(3)

        detail = GoodsDetailPage(self.mini)
        detail.refresh_page()
        loaded = detail.wait_loaded(timeout=10)
        self.assertTrue(loaded, '商品详情加载超时')
        self.assertFalse(detail.is_unshelved(), '商品已下架')

        name = detail.get_goods_name()
        self.assertTrue(len(name) > 0, '商品名称为空')
        print(f'  商品名称: {name}')

        img_count = detail.get_image_count()
        self.assertGreater(img_count, 0, '商品图片为空')
        print(f'  图片数量: {img_count}')
